idea.name: Contractor Proof Workflow
idea.description: A focused proof collection workflow that helps small specialty contractors document completed work and speed up customer handoffs before testing broader automation.
idea.angle: proof gaps delay handoffs and payment
idea.why_now: The stored fixture trend shows repeated proof and handoff friction.
constraints: validate willingness to pay before building

verdict.top_reason: The buyer and pain are plausible, but payment urgency still needs proof.
verdict.next_step: Pre-sell one manual proof package to a specialty contractor.
verdict.ghost_town_risk: Contractors may accept the pain but refuse another standalone tool.
verdict.buyer_pain_clarity: The buyer is the contractor owner losing time when proof is incomplete.
verdict.willingness_to_pay_signal: A paid manual proof package is the required signal.
verdict.distribution_difficulty: Reach owners through direct trade relationships before paid acquisition.
verdict.unfair_advantage_check: A narrow trade-specific workflow is more credible than a generic platform.
verdict.business_model_weakness: A low-frequency workflow may not support recurring software pricing.
verdict.why_it_might_work: Completed proof can unblock a customer handoff and payment conversation.
verdict.why_it_might_fail: The buyer may tolerate the pain instead of changing the workflow.
verdict.killer_question: Will one contractor pay for the manual outcome now?
verdict.mvp_test: Offer one manually delivered proof package before writing software.

angles.purpose: explain why the idea may fail
angles.viewer_question: What could make this idea fail?
angles.expected_behavior_signal: viewer tests the risk with a buyer

angles.purpose: identify who actually pays and why
angles.viewer_question: Who owns this pain strongly enough to pay?

angles.purpose: give the smallest test before building
angles.viewer_question: What is the smallest paid test?

angles.purpose: show the better wedge or hidden opportunity
explain what to build first if the idea is still worth testing

title_variants: Why This Contractor Proof Idea Could Fail
ghost_town_risk.hook: Painful truth: this contractor proof idea can fail before a buyer pays.
ghost_town_risk.script: Painful truth: this contractor proof idea can fail before a buyer pays. The customer may tolerate incomplete proof instead of changing the workflow. Ask the contractor owner to pay for one manual test before building. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.
ghost_town_risk.caption: The buyer may tolerate this painful workflow instead of paying to change it. Run one paid test. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.
ghost_town_risk.cta: Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.

buyer_reality.hook: Buyer reality: the user is not enough; find the contractor owner who pays.
buyer_reality.script: Buyer reality: the user is not enough; find the contractor owner who pays. The pain belongs to the owner losing time during customer handoff. Ask that buyer for a paid manual test. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.
buyer_reality.caption: Name the buyer, painful handoff, and budget before building. Ask for a paid test. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.

title_variants: Run This Contractor Proof Test First
fast_validation_test.hook: Before building, test whether one contractor buyer pays for proof help.
fast_validation_test.script: Before building, test whether one contractor buyer pays for proof help. Offer one manual package tied to the painful customer handoff. Ask for payment and use that action as evidence. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.
fast_validation_test.caption: Test the painful outcome with one buyer before software. Ask for payment. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.

contrarian_opportunity.hook: The broad platform may be wrong; the buyer needs one painful proof outcome.
contrarian_opportunity.script: The broad platform may be wrong; the buyer needs one painful proof outcome. Sell the customer handoff result manually, then test which repeated step deserves automation. Build around evidence, not feature guesses. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.
contrarian_opportunity.caption: The opportunity is a narrow painful outcome for one buyer. Sell it before automating. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.

title_variants: Build This Contractor Proof MVP First
builder_action_plan.hook: Build this first: one manual proof package for one contractor buyer.
builder_action_plan.script: Build this first: one manual proof package for one contractor buyer. Solve the painful customer handoff and track the result. Ask the buyer to repeat or pay again before automating the workflow. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.
builder_action_plan.caption: Build one buyer outcome, test the painful handoff, and ask for repeat payment. Test your business idea at GhostTownTest.com.
